message:
feat(grpc): add gRPC-web protocol support module

- WebFrameCodec: data frames + trailer frames with flag 0x80
- ContentType: parse application/grpc-web and application/grpc-web-text
- Trailer encoding/decoding: Status + Metadata as HTTP/1.1 header block
- Base64 text mode: encode/decode for browser-compatible transport
- Detection helpers: is_grpc_web_request(), is_text_mode()
- 20 unit tests covering framing, trailers, base64, content type parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
